name: Black Sea conflict risk zone
description: Military activity and export disruption risk in north-west Black Sea approaches.
impact: Delays, higher insurance, possible diversions for grain from Ukraine.
recommended_response: Monitor AIS; prefer insured tonnage; consider alternative corridors.

name: Red Sea security risk
description: Elevated maritime security incidents affecting Suez–Bab el-Mandeb corridor.
impact: Schedule slippage and canal transit uncertainty.
recommended_response: Coordinate with operators; update ETAs to Egyptian ports.

name: Eastern Mediterranean tension
description: Strategic shipping density and periodic air-naval activity east of Crete.
recommended_response: Maintain communications watch; use suggested safer waypoints.

name: Suez Canal congestion risk
description: Queues and pilot availability can delay convoys.

name: Ukraine export disruption
description: Policy and military risk around key export load ports.

name: Middle East instability band
description: Broader regional instability affecting eastern Med relay routes.
recommended_response: Higher monitoring frequency for laden inbound vessels.
